ExpandedDescription: Default primary buttons (.btn-primary) have insufficient contrast against their background (typically <4.5:1 for normal text or <3:1 for large)
AcceptanceCriteria: failing WCAG 1.4.3/1.4.6. This affects every primary action button in ServiceNow portals and is the #1 reported visual issue.
Test: All .btn-primary instances pass WCAG AAA contrast (≥7:1 on background) when inspected with axe or Contrast Checker; no regression on hover/active states.
Solution1: 1. Load litmus test widget → inspect Primary Button. 2. Run axe DevTools → zero contrast violations on buttons. 3. Keyboard tab + screenshot with color picker.
Solution2: CSS var override --sb-primary + color: #fff !important in core-overrides.scss
Solution3: html body .btn-primary { background: #0a5; color: #000 !important; } in a11y.scss
Solution4: Theme CSS Variables record with !default high-contrast colors
EffortLevel: Post-process with filter: contrast(1.2) utility (last resort)
